Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> I am wondering why the whole SSL code has been removed in this commit? Looking at the commit's title, I suppose that the intention was to disable the setting of truststore in system properties. So, the commit should have just removed these three lines:
> 
> System.setProperty("jsse.enableSNIExtension", "false");
> System.setProperty("javax.net.ssl.trustStore", p.trustStoreFileName);
> System.setProperty("javax.net.ssl.trustStorePassword", p.trustStorePassword);
> 
> I am trying to figure out how the DGs can make https connection after this change? If there is some other way that I am missing here, please advise.

HTTPS works without doing anything special. It just uses the JVM's truststore.
